headline: SPACEX IPO ROADSHOW GOES LIVE — SPCX TO DEBUT ON NASDAQ JUNE 12, PRICES JUNE 11 AT FIXED $135, ~$1.75T
SPACEX PROSPECTUS: $18.7B 2025 REVENUE, STARLINK ~61%, $4.9B NET LOSS — IPO PRICED AT ~94X SALES
BROADCOM CLOSES DOWN ~12.6% AS DOW HITS RECORD; AI-CHIP SELLOFF EASES INTO THE BELL
ANTHROPIC CORRECTS RSI DATA — OPUS 4 3X SPEEDUP DATES TO MAY 2025, NOT 2024; 2024 MODELS SHOWED ZERO
